summary: Log fold change shrinkage is useful for visualization and ranking of genes.
The apeglm method is the default shrinkage estimator in DESeq2 as of version 1.28.0.
The ashr shrinkage estimator fits a mixture of Normal distributions to form the prior.
The apeglm method has been sped up to take roughly the same time as the normal method, approximately 5 seconds for the pasilla dataset.
